Code fragment: public final TableField<DeckRecord, Long> ID = createField(DSL.name("id"), SQLDataType.BIGINT.nullable(false).identity(true), this, "");
Explanation: The primary key is named generically 'id' instead of a more descriptive name like 'deck_id'. Consider renaming the primary key to 'deck_id' to make it self-documenting and easier to identify in queries and foreign key relationships.
